texto: Judges are but men and are swayed like other men by vehement prejudices. This is corruption in reality give it whatever other name you please.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a David Dudley Field: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Judges are but men and are swayed like other men by vehement prejudices. This is corruption in re…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, judge, other pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
